corrections.note: Middle dot after Σιμων is not on the page; name also bears accent.
Latin abbreviation printed as incep, not inccep.
Dative τω is printed, not του.
Variant is singular αυτω, not plural αυτων.

corrections.current: εν αυτη οντας οντας εκει ℵV
corrections.correct: εν αυτη οντας οντας εκι ℵV
corrections.note: Printed apparatus has εκι, not εκει.
Apparatus prints this entry without Greek accents and with Latin o.
The final siglum group is ℵV*, not V* alone.

corrections.current: 18—19 om ἀπώλετο και ἀπέστειλεν τὰ παιδάρια ℵ
corrections.correct: 18—19 om απωλετο και απεστειλεν τα παιδαρια ℵ*
corrections.note: Printed apparatus has unaccented words here and siglum ℵ*.
Printed has no accent on Τρυφων and includes final period in c.a.
Only ℵ is cited for this variant on the page.

uncertain.note: The first word after verse number may read εταχυναν or εταχυνεν in the apparatus; image suggests εταχυναν but small type is tight.
The parenthetical after ἁπ may include punctuation/abbreviation details difficult to resolve with certainty from the scan.

notes: Running head matches. Body is largely correct, but one substantive reading (ἀνέστη) and one punctuation/accent issue were found. Apparatus contains several transcription/normalization errors, including sigla and Latin/Greek form details.
